images.caption: Reading win the ground ball, but expect some pain from Graeme Holland, with Dennis McKenna closing in to help out
Reading's Raj goes for the '**** or bust' check. Looks like it might work too, as Dave Cluney is hanging his stick out.
Dennis McKenna drives for goal. The Reading defender has pretty good position, but does he have the speed to keep up?
Reading's Jon Thurlbourne looks to pressure the pass to Dennis McKenna
Dave Cluney getting friendly at the face-off
Ground ball action with Chris Spence (right) ready to lay the hickory, and Dennis McKenna (left) looking to clean up
